other_observers: Went to see the bird with Bill Maynard, David Tønnessen.  Also, present Mark Peterson, Dan Brooke, Cheryl Teuton. Joe Mammoser, and others.
description: A purplish colored plump shorebird, feeding in the inlet creek.  Orange legs, down curved bill with orange color at base see my photos.  The bird was found on 16 December 2016, and seen my many on 17, 18, 19 December, 2016.
photographer: Photographer: Brandon K Percival, Brandon K Percival, Brandon K Percival, Brandon K Percival
